name: Ponte del Diavolo
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Ponte del Diavolo (Martin Ebel, 2007): on a 10x10 grid, place two tiles per turn to build four-tile islands, then connect them with bridges. Each bridge-linked group of islands scores a triangular number, so linking islands is worth far more than leaving them alone. Islands must never grow past four tiles or touch a same-colour neighbour, even diagonally.
